### Instructions
1. Please upload your SVG file **directly in the comment below** after submitting this issue.
2. Our automated system will validate the file structure immediately.
3. **Important:** Ensure the SVG is clean, optimized, and does not contain embedded bitmap images.

### Icon Details
- **Icon Name:**
- **Description and Official Link:**
- **I confirm the file is an optimized SVG and follows the rules:** [ ]

---

**Links will be ignored, please upload your icon/image.**

**Again, read main rules: low quality images of products will be ignored, if you can not be bothered to search we won't either.**

**Off-type icons will not be accepted. Home Assistant makes it visible when an entity is on or off; it is useless to weigh down the library.**
